node.title: Mock Interview with Google, Uber, Salesforce & Goldman Sachs Engineers!

topic.title: Mock Interview with Google, Uber, Salesforce & Goldman Sachs Engineers!

post.content:
We're a group of friends working at Google, Uber, Salesforce, and Goldman Sachs, and we're passionate about helping aspiring tech professionals like you.

We're offering mock interviews to provide you with:

* **Insider perspectives:** Get a glimpse into the interview styles and expectations at each company.
* **Tailored feedback:** Receive personalized advice on your coding, problem-solving, and communication skills.
* **Friendly support:** Practice in a relaxed environment and gain confidence for the real deal.
Fill the Google form
https://forms.gle/wiGhBBfdiZghBenJ7
Filled the form,but don\'t have any update
